title: Shortened & Sharpened Swords
description: This texture pack shortens and sharpens all swords in the game.
body:
This texture pack shortens and sharpens all the swords in the game. At the moment, copper tools are not in the game. Once they are added, I will sharpen and shorten the copper sword.

If you have any suggestions, you can DM me on discord. 
```
digatextz
```
